chief_complaint: A 1-year-old girl presented with seizures and a right-sided scalp swelling.
history: The child had a previous head injury at 2 months old, which resulted in a growing skull fracture (GSF). The GSF presented with seizures and a right-sided scalp swelling.
exam: Vital signs were not provided. Physical examination revealed a right-sided scalp swelling.
labs: Imaging studies (not specified) revealed a GSF. Other investigations were not mentioned.
